ec2.instance.elasticgpuspecification.Typ.Description: The type of Elastic Graphics accelerator. For more information about the values to specify for `Type`, see [Elastic Graphics Basics](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/WindowsGuide/elastic-graphics.html#elastic-graphics-basics), specifically the Elastic Graphics accelerator column, in the *Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud User Guide for Windows Instances*.
